title: Fix vote round rendering in congress UI

log.context: Fix vote round rendering in congress UI

**Root cause:** The `isVoteEntry()` function in `renderDebateFeed` used strict equality to check if the first whitespace-delimited token of a response was `'AGREE'` or `'DISAGREE'`. Pippi's vote response in congress-0015 started with `"AGREE."` (period at the end of the word). The split produced `"AGREE."` which did not strictly equal `"AGREE"`, so the entry was not recognized as a vote — it was treated as a regular debate response and incremented Pippi's round counter to 4, causing a "Round 4" ...(truncated)
